LanguageData.ME_Toxic.label: toxin round
LanguageData.ME_Toxic.description: Neurotoxin in the bloodstream. Causes nausea and severe degradation of neuromotor functions. \nAt high doses, toxic buildup can have severe health effects. Even at low doses, it can generate cancers. \nCreatures who die with toxic buildup cannot be eaten.
LanguageData.ME_Toxic.stages.0.label: initial
LanguageData.ME_Toxic.stages.1.label: initial
LanguageData.ME_Toxic.stages.2.label: minor
LanguageData.ME_Toxic.stages.3.label: moderate
LanguageData.ME_Toxic.stages.4.label: serious
LanguageData.ME_Toxic.stages.5.label: extreme
LanguageData.ME_Freeze.label: Freeze
LanguageData.ME_Freeze.description: Dangerously low core body temperature. Unless re-warmed, hypothermia gets worse and ends in death. Recovery is quick once the victim is re-warmed. Avoid hypothermia by wearing warm clothes in cold environments.
LanguageData.ME_Freeze.stages.0.label: shivering
LanguageData.ME_Freeze.stages.1.label: shivering
LanguageData.ME_Freeze.stages.2.label: minor
LanguageData.ME_Freeze.stages.3.label: serious
LanguageData.ME_Freeze.stages.4.label: extreme
LanguageData.ME_Freeze.stages.5.label: Frozen
LanguageData.ME_PrometheumSoaked.label: Incendiary agent
LanguageData.ME_PrometheumSoaked.stages.0.label: minor
LanguageData.ME_PrometheumSoaked.stages.1.label: dripping
LanguageData.ME_PrometheumSoaked.stages.2.label: soaked
LanguageData.ME_PrometheumSoaked.stages.3.label: drenched
